hypothesis: A chained multi-fidelity Δ-learning pipeline that first corrects GFN1-xTB to PBE and then PBE to HSE06 will reduce the HSE06 band-gap MAE by at least 15% overall and by at least 25% for MOFs containing Cr, Mn, Fe, Co, or Ni compared to a single-stage GFN1-xTB-to-HSE06 Δ-learning baseline evaluated on identical splits.
